—We do not need to explain these laws in detail; we have reason to be thankful that we need fear no defilement except that of sin, nor do we need ceremonial and burdensome purifications. These laws remind us that God sees all things, even those which escape the notice of people. The important gospel duties of faith and repentance are signified here, and the important gospel privileges of the application of Christ's blood to our souls for our justification, and his grace for our sanctification.
